zh.Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Engla: 英國萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯
zh.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德
zh.Husbands Bosworth, Harborough district,: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Buswell於1595年4月23日之前出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯時，她的父親Roger Buswell49歲，母親Mrs. Margaret Buswell46歲。她於1616年2月13日與Richard Smith Sr.在英國萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1668年10月12日之後在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Buswell于1595年4月23日之前出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯时，她的父亲Roger Buswell49岁，母亲Mrs. Margaret Buswell46岁。她于1616年2月13日与Richard Smith Sr.在英国萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1668年10月12日之后在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Buswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Boswell  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Boswell
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Beuzeville-la-Giffard in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the ancient Germanic personal name Boso + ville ‘settlement’. The final element has been altered as a result of association with the common placename ending -well ‘spring, stream’. Some instances of Bovill may have the same origin.

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Buswell was born before 23 April 1595, in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, her father, Roger Buswell, was 49 and her mother, Mrs. Margaret Buswell, was 46. She married Richard Smith Sr. on 13 February 1616, in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 12 October 1668, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

Elle est décédée après 12 octobre 1668, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Buswell(이)가 1595년 4월 23일 이전 영국 레이스스터실르 후스반드즈 보스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Buswell(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Margaret Buswell(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1616년 2월 13일 영국 레이스스터실르 후스반드즈 보스워스에서 Richard Smith Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1668년 10월 12일 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Buswell родилась перед 23 апрель 1595 г. в местности хусбандс босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Buswell было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Margaret Buswell, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Smith Sr. 13 февраля 1616 г. в местности хусбандс босворт, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 12 октябрь 1668 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.
